title: CI has no dependency-advisory gate (RL-a9d3)
context: rules-generate authored and fixture-validated .paqad/scripts/rules/coding/stacks/_shared/ci-cd/003-dependency-audit-gate.mjs for RL-a9d3 ('Fail the build on high or critical dependency advisories'). Dry-run on the current tree is red: no workflow in .github/workflows runs an audit/osv/snyk step, so registering the script would arm a whole-tree gate that is immediately red. The script is validated but held unregistered.

options.label: Add a pnpm audit step to ci.yml, then register the script (gate arms green)
Register now and let the checks stage stay red until an audit step lands

rationale: User chose to leave RL-a9d3 unscripted this cycle; the validated script stays on disk unregistered and can be registered once an audit step is added to CI.
